query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM reactivation_contacts WHERE completedJobId IS NULL;
SELECT id, name, firstName, phone, lastBookingDate, daysSince, bookingCount, lastPrice, segment, campaignId FROM reactivation_contacts WHERE completedJobId IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
